+# Execution Report
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-156
+AUTHOR: Executor / Claude
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-05-24_15-51-01+0300
+RELATED_FILES:
+- crates/rge-data/Cargo.toml — added `rge-kernel-ecs = { workspace = true }` under `[dev-dependencies]`
+- crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_load_tick.rs — new GPU-free load+tick regression test
+- Cargo.lock — mechanical dependency-list update for the new `rge-data` dev-dependency
+STATUS: AWAITING_REVIEW
+
+## Task Packet Reference
+
+`ai_handoffs/ISSUE-156_TASK_2026-05-24_15-41-54+0300.md`
+
+## Pre-Execution Review Consumed
+
+No pre-execution review issued for this dispatch.
+
+## What I Changed
+
+### Source
+
+- `crates/rge-data/Cargo.toml`: added exactly one new line under
+  `[dev-dependencies]` — `rge-kernel-ecs = { workspace = true }` — replacing
+  the prior placeholder comment. `rge-kernel-ecs` is **not** present in
+  `[dependencies]`, no other crate manifest was edited, and the workspace
+  manifest was not touched.
+
+### Tests
+
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_load_tick.rs::simple_scene_loads_into_world_and_advances_tick`:
+  reads `golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project` and parses it as
+  `rge_data::Project`, resolves the first `Project.scenes` path relative to
+  the manifest directory, parses that file as `rge_data::Scene`, and bridges
+  it into a fresh `rge_kernel_ecs::World` via a private file-local helper
+  `load_scene_into_world` that calls
+  `World::spawn_with_id(EntityId::from_ulid(entity.id.0))` exactly once per
+  parsed scene entity. The test asserts
+  `world.entity_count() == scene.entities.len()`, asserts per-entity
+  existence through `World::entity(...)`, captures `current_tick()` /
+  `last_tick()`, calls `advance_tick()`, then asserts `current_tick()`
+  advanced by one and `last_tick()` equals the prior `current_tick()`. The
+  helper is identity-only — it does not inspect or translate components,
+  relations, assets, transforms, cameras, lights, or any other typed data.
+  Count assertions compare against `scene.entities.len()` rather than a
+  hard-coded `1`, so the test stays correct if the fixture grows.
+
+### Docs
+
+- None.
+
+## Per-File Summary
+
+Two source-facing edits:
+
+- `crates/rge-data/Cargo.toml` — one-line dev-dependency addition.
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_load_tick.rs` — new test file
+  (sole new source-facing file).
+
+`Cargo.lock` updated mechanically: the `rge-data` package's dependency list
+gained a single `rge-kernel-ecs` entry; no registry version, checksum,
+source URL, unrelated package dependency list, or workspace member changed.
+
+## Verification Results
+
+All commands run from `A:\RCAD\RGE` with cargo resolved via
+`A:\RustCache\cargo\bin\cargo.exe` (the user's CARGO_HOME).
+
+- Before-edit `git status --short --untracked-files=no` → no tracked
+  changes (empty output).
+- Untracked items observed before edit: this dispatch's TASK packet
+  (`ai_handoffs/ISSUE-156_TASK_2026-05-24_15-41-54+0300.md` and its
+  `.meta.json` sidecar) — both already on disk per branch state.
+- `cargo test -p rge-data --test golden_simple_scene_load_tick` → exit 0
+  (`1 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 0 measured; 0 filtered out`).
+- `.\.ai\dispatch.verify.ps1` → exit 0 (all 7 verification steps passed:
+  `cargo +nightly fmt --check`, architecture lints, architecture-lint test
+  suite, `cargo build --workspace --all-targets`, `cargo test --workspace
+  --all-targets`, `cargo test --workspace --doc`, `cargo bench -p
+  rge-script-bench --no-run`).
+- After-edit `git status --short --untracked-files=no` →
+  ` M Cargo.lock` and ` M crates/rge-data/Cargo.toml` only.
+- After-edit full `git status --short` adds the new untracked items:
+  `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_load_tick.rs` (the allowed
+  new test) and the EXEC report
+  `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-156_EXEC_2026-05-24_15-51-01+0300.md` (this packet
+  before sidecar finalization). The TASK packet and its sidecar remain
+  untracked as they were before edit.
+
+`Cargo.lock` diff inspected — limited to:
+
+```
+@@ -4389,6 +4389,7 @@ name = "rge-data"
+ version = "0.0.1"
+ dependencies = [
+  "rge-kernel-asset",
++ "rge-kernel-ecs",
+  "ron",
+  "serde",
+  "thiserror 2.0.18",
+```
+
+This is exactly the mechanical dependency-list effect of the new
+`rge-data` dev-dependency permitted by the Task Packet.
+
+## Deviations from Task Packet
+
+None — execution stayed strictly within the Task Packet scope.
+
+## Open Questions for Reviewer
+
+None. The Planner notes specify the helper shape verbatim
+(`World::spawn_with_id(EntityId::from_ulid(entity.id.0))` over
+`scene.entities`); the implementation matches that shape one-to-one and
+asserts entity-count, per-entity existence, `current_tick`, and `last_tick`
+behavior after `advance_tick` as required.
+
+## Worktree State
+
+- Tracked files modified-but-uncommitted: `Cargo.lock`,
+  `crates/rge-data/Cargo.toml`.
+- Untracked items:
+  `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_load_tick.rs` (allowed new
+  test file), `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-156_TASK_2026-05-24_15-41-54+0300.md` and
+  `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-156_TASK_2026-05-24_15-41-54+0300.meta.json` (this
+  dispatch's TASK packet, present from branch tip), and this EXEC report
+  `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-156_EXEC_2026-05-24_15-51-01+0300.md` (its `.meta.json`
+  sidecar will be produced by `new-handoff.ps1 -Finalize`).
+- Branch: `ai-dispatch/ISSUE-156`
+- Last commit: `c3d8afe` chore(dispatch): seed task #36 simple-scene load-tick test
+
+---
+
+HANDOFF_STATUS: COMPLETE
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-156
+AUTHOR: Executor / Claude
+NEXT_ROLE: REVIEWER_AI
+EXIT_CODE: 0
+
+---

@@ -0,0 +1,305 @@
+# Task Packet
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-156
+AUTHOR: Planner / OpenAI Codex
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-05-24_15-41-54+0300
+RELATED_FILES:
+- .ai/dispatch.tasks.md
+- .ai/dispatch.verify.ps1
+- ai_handoffs/AI_HANDOFF_PROTOCOL.md
+- AI_DISPATCH_AUTOMATION.md
+- ai_handoffs/ISSUE-154_TASK_2026-05-24_14-47-18+0300.md
+- ai_handoffs/ISSUE-154_EXEC_2026-05-24_14-59-53+0300.md
+- golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project
+- golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene
+- crates/rge-data/Cargo.toml
+- Cargo.lock
+- crates/rge-data/src/project.rs
+- crates/rge-data/src/scene.rs
+- crates/rge-data/src/entity_ref.rs
+- crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_schema.rs
+- crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_load_tick.rs
+- kernel/ecs/src/entity.rs
+- kernel/ecs/src/world.rs
+- ai_handoffs/ISSUE-156_EXEC_*.md
+- ai_handoffs/ISSUE-156_EXEC_*.meta.json
+- ai_dispatch_logs/log_*.md
+- GitHub issue #156
+STATUS: OPEN
+
+## Goal
+
+Fix GitHub issue #156 by adding the smallest GPU-free load+tick regression for
+`golden-projects/simple-scene`. The new regression must load the project
+manifest as `rge_data::Project`, resolve its scene path, parse that file as
+`rge_data::Scene`, build a `rge_kernel_ecs::World` with one ECS entity for each
+parsed scene entity through a test-local identity-only helper, and assert that
+the resulting world both contains those entities and advances its tick counters.
+This dispatch must intentionally avoid a production scene loader or typed
+component bridge.
+
+## Scope
+
+### MAY edit
+- `crates/rge-data/Cargo.toml`
+- `Cargo.lock`, only if Cargo mechanically updates the `rge-data` package
+  dependency list because `rge-kernel-ecs` was added as a dev-dependency.
+
+### MUST NOT edit
+- Any file under `golden-projects/**`.
+- Any production source file under `crates/**`, `kernel/**`, `runtime/**`,
+  `editor/**`, or any other source tree.
+- Any existing test file, including every existing file under
+  `crates/rge-data/tests/**`.
+- Any file under `kernel/**`, including ECS source, tests, manifests, and
+  examples.
+- Any renderer, GPU, asset-store, asset-pipeline, build-pipeline, cook output,
+  screenshot baseline, generated asset, or renderer comparison artifact.
+- Any typed component bridging, component crate, editor UI, script crate,
+  marketplace crate, runtime crate, or loader crate.
+- Any `Cargo.toml` other than `crates/rge-data/Cargo.toml`.
+- The workspace manifest `Cargo.toml`.
+- Any workflow under `.github/**`.
+- Any PowerShell script, shell script, schema, architecture lint, doctrine
+  document, status document, planning document, ADR, README, or root-level
+  repository document.
+- Any existing handoff packet or existing dispatch log, including this TASK
+  packet after execution begins.
+- Any GitHub issue, label, PR, branch, review, comment, commit, remote state,
+  or queue metadata except the queue runner's normal issue lifecycle for this
+  dispatch.
+
+### MAY add new files
+- Exactly one new source-facing test file:
+  `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_load_tick.rs`.
+- Exactly one execution report matching `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-156_EXEC_*.md`.
+- The matching `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-156_EXEC_*.meta.json` sidecar only if
+  `new-handoff.ps1 -Finalize` creates it while finalizing the EXEC report.
+- This dispatch's own queue-runner log under `ai_dispatch_logs/log_*.md` only
+  if the queue runner creates it as part of normal dispatch operation.
+
+### MUST NOT add new files
+- Any source-facing file other than
+  `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_load_tick.rs`.
+- Any golden-project file, fixture, scene, prefab, asset, generated asset,
+  cook output, screenshot baseline, renderer comparison artifact, production
+  source file, component bridge, workspace member, crate, dependency file,
+  schema, script, workflow, architecture lint, doctrine document, status
+  document, planning document, ADR, README, TASK packet, REVIEW packet,
+  CLOSEOUT packet, issue note, or design document.
+- Any handoff packet other than this dispatch's single `ISSUE-156_EXEC_*.md`
+  report and optional matching `.meta.json` sidecar.
+
+## Deliverables
+
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_load_tick.rs` exists as the only
+  new source-facing file.
+- `crates/rge-data/Cargo.toml` adds exactly one dev-dependency line under
+  `[dev-dependencies]`: `rge-kernel-ecs = { workspace = true }`.
+- `rge-kernel-ecs` is not added to `[dependencies]` in `rge-data`, not added
+  to any other crate, and not added by editing the workspace manifest.
+- The new test reads `golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project` and parses it
+  as `rge_data::Project`.
+- The new test resolves the scene path from `Project.scenes` relative to the
+  project manifest directory, then reads and parses that file as
+  `rge_data::Scene`.
+- The new test implements the `rge_data::Scene` to `rge_kernel_ecs::World`
+  bridge as a private test-local helper in
+  `golden_simple_scene_load_tick.rs` only.
+- The helper constructs a `rge_kernel_ecs::World` and calls
+  `World::spawn_with_id(rge_kernel_ecs::EntityId::from_ulid(...))` exactly once
+  for each parsed `scene.entities` item. It must preserve the parsed scene
+  entity ULIDs and must not inspect, translate, or bridge components or
+  relations.
+- The test asserts `world.entity_count() == scene.entities.len()`.
+- The test asserts each parsed scene entity exists in the world through the
+  public `World::entity` API after converting the parsed scene ULID to
+  `rge_kernel_ecs::EntityId`.
+- The test captures `current_tick()` and `last_tick()` on the loaded world,
+  calls `advance_tick()`, then asserts `current_tick()` advanced by one and
+  `last_tick()` updated to the prior current tick.
+- One `EXECUTION_REPORT` packet documents the implementation, before and after
+  worktree status, verification commands, exact exit codes, and any
+  pre-existing tracked changes.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- The only source-facing repository changes are:
+  `crates/rge-data/Cargo.toml`,
+  `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_load_tick.rs`, and `Cargo.lock`
+  only if Cargo requires the mechanical lockfile update for the new
+  `rge-data` dev-dependency.
+- Exactly one new test file is added, and it is exactly
+  `crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_load_tick.rs`.
+- No existing test file is edited.
+- No production source file is edited.
+- No file under `golden-projects/**` is edited or added.
+- `rge-kernel-ecs` appears in `crates/rge-data/Cargo.toml` only under
+  `[dev-dependencies]`.
+- No production dependency edge from `rge-data` to `rge-kernel-ecs` is added.
+- No other crate manifest, workspace manifest, or dependency declaration is
+  changed.
+- Any `Cargo.lock` diff is limited to the mechanical dependency-list effect of
+  the new `rge-data` dev-dependency; it must not change registry versions,
+  checksums, sources, unrelated package dependency lists, or workspace members.
+- The new test loads the scene through `Project.scenes` and does not hard-code
+  `golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene` as an independent scene
+  fixture path.
+- The test-local bridge lives only in the new test file and is not exported.
+- The bridge is identity-only: it spawns ECS entities with parsed scene IDs and
+  does not translate components, relations, assets, cameras, lights,
+  transforms, renderer resources, editor state, scripts, or typed components.

+## Planner Notes
+
+This dispatch is the implementation follow-up to the ISSUE-154 preflight audit.
+The audit found no existing direct `rge_data::Scene` to `rge_kernel_ecs::World`
+bridge, but identified a smallest safe regression: keep the bridge private to a
+new `rge-data` integration test and add `rge-kernel-ecs` only as a
+dev-dependency. That gives the golden simple-scene fixture a real load+tick
+regression without deciding where a production scene loader should live.
+
+The intended helper shape is simple:
+
+```rust
+fn load_scene_into_world(scene: &rge_data::Scene) -> rge_kernel_ecs::World {
+    let mut world = rge_kernel_ecs::World::new();
+    for entity in &scene.entities {
+        let id = rge_kernel_ecs::EntityId::from_ulid(entity.id.0);
+        world.spawn_with_id(id);
+    }
+    world
+}
+```
+
+Use the existing `golden_simple_scene_schema.rs` path-resolution pattern for
+the project manifest and referenced scene. The new test may share ideas with
+that file, but must not edit it. The current simple-scene fixture has one
+parsed entity today; the regression should compare against `scene.entities`
+rather than hard-coding that count so it remains correct if the fixture grows
+in a future dispatch.
+
+Under the orchestrator protocol, no `_REVIEW_` or `_CLOSEOUT_` packet is
+expected from this TASK. The only new packet produced by execution should be
+the `ISSUE-156_EXEC_*.md` report, plus its optional generated sidecar and the
+queue runner's own log if applicable.
+
+Verbatim review-gate strings from the issue body:
+
+```text
+MUST add exactly one new test file at crates/rge-data/tests/golden_simple_scene_load_tick.rs
+MUST add rge-kernel-ecs as a dev-dependency of rge-data only, not a production dependency
+MUST implement the rge_data::Scene to rge_kernel_ecs::World bridge as a test-local helper only
+MUST load golden-projects/simple-scene through the Project scene path, spawn one ECS entity per parsed scene entity, and assert entity_count plus entity existence
+MUST assert World advance_tick updates current_tick and last_tick on the loaded world
+MUST NOT touch golden-project files, production source, kernel/editor/script crates, renderer/GPU, asset-store, cook output, screenshot baselines, typed component bridging, workflows, scripts, doctrine, or status docs
+MUST run cargo test -p rge-data --test golden_simple_scene_load_tick and the canonical .ai/dispatch.verify.ps1 gate successfully
+```
+
